description: You are an AV technician at a natural history museum preparing audio for the 'Deep Sea' immersive exhibit. Using the raw audio layers in /home/ga/Audio/exhibit_raw/ (rumble.wav, ambience.wav, and fx.wav), prepare a session and export a stereo mix to /home/ga/Audio/exhibit_final/exhibit_mix.wav. The session must feature three tracks named 'Tactile Bass', 'Overhead Ambience', and 'Spot FX' containing their respective files, all aligned to start at 0:00.000 and trimmed to exactly 20.000 seconds. Additionally, include a Range Marker named 'Exhibit_Loop' from 0:00.000 to 20:00.000, set the 'Tactile Bass' track gain to +3 dB, and mute the 'Spot FX' track.
